# Welgent

> Welgent is a Conversational AI Sales Assistant for service businesses. It answers every inbound call 24/7, qualifies leads, books appointments, and follows up automatically so businesses never miss a customer.

## What Welgent Does

Welgent gives service businesses an always-on AI Sales Assistant that:

- Answers every inbound phone call before the second ring, 24/7 including weekends and holidays
- Holds natural voice conversations with callers — not robotic menus or hold music
- Asks intake questions specific to the business (name, contact details, service type, job specifics)
- Qualifies each lead before it reaches the business owner
- Books appointments directly onto the business calendar
- Sends automated confirmation and follow-up messages to reduce no-shows

## The Problem It Solves

62% of calls to small service businesses go unanswered. When a caller doesn't get an answer they move on to the next provider within minutes. Welgent eliminates missed-call revenue loss by ensuring every caller is greeted, helped, and booked.

## Who It's For

Service businesses that receive inbound calls from potential customers:
- HVAC companies
- Roofing contractors
- Junk removal companies
- Dental and medical practices
- Fitness studios and gyms
- Home services (plumbing, electrical, landscaping, cleaning)
- Any other service business where phone calls drive new customers

## Key Facts

- Always available: operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
- Natural language: speaks conversationally, not with scripted menus
- Lead qualification: collects intake information and filters leads before escalating
- Appointment booking: integrates with business calendars to schedule in real time
- Automated follow-up: sends SMS and email follow-ups automatically
- No staff required: the AI handles the full call flow without human involvement

## Contact / Demo
